response: You possess a standard UK red plug. Which wall outlet should you insert it into: the circular-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the triangular-pin socket?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a red UK plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
